record.field:
# Check status of invoices stuck in 'submitted' state. from datetime import datetime as _dt, timedelta as _td
submitted_moves = env['account.move'].search([ ('einvoice_status', '=', 'submitted'), ('state', '=', 'posted'), ('move_type', 'in', ['out_invoice', 'out_refund']), ('einvoice_submission_date', '!=', False), ])
cutoff = _dt.now() - _td(hours=1)
for move in submitted_moves: if move.einvoice_submission_date and move.einvoice_submission_date < cutoff: import logging logging.getLogger(__name__).info( 'E-invoice status sync: %s has been in submitted state since %s', move.name, move.einvoice_submission_date )
